race.description: Sportsbet Up & Coming Stars Series Ht 7 Maiden Plate
race.comment: GENOMIC (6) looks nicely suited to this third up. Two runs to date have been good, close up in town on debut before another good run when sticking on for third here last time out. Slightly tricky draw but he'll roll forward and can improve again. OYSTER LANE (10) has run well in some handy maidens without quite getting the job done. He comes through the same race as GENOMIC here last time without the best of luck. He'll do no work from the inside gate. DAMA ROYALE (15) has placed in all five runs to date, finding the line well in a stronger maiden at Caulfield Heath last time. A repeat of that goes close. LE BEAU GOSSE (8) ran on well on debut at Warrnambool and will be better for that. IL PATRIGNO (2) has placed in both runs back, sent around big odds in town last time. Have to respect here.
